case_title: WORK RETURN VS LAW OFFICES OF LIVINGSTON & WEISS et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 6/30/99, DELETED. PER ORDER OF JUDGE DESMOND CASE WAS SETTLED IN SUPERIOR COURT AND MATTER DISMISSED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,284.00 FILED BY WORK RETURN AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF LIVINGSTON & WEISS WEISS, WILLIAM ATTY. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25880, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SUMS, THIS MATTER SHALL BE DISMISSED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORK RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF LIVINGSTON & WEISS WEISS, WILLIAM ATTY. $3,284.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,310.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SETTLEMENT AS FOLLOWS: DEFT. TO PAY TO PLFT. THE SUM OF $600. BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS 6/17/99 AND AN ADDITIONAL $750. BY 6/30/99. AFTER PAYMENT OF SAID
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ATTNY. WM. WEISS -LAW OFCS.OF WM. WEISS RETURNED SIGNED;
